name: Entity Action
desc: Player performs an action: crouch, uncrouch, sprint, stop sprint, leave bed, jump with horse, open inventory.

fields.name: entityID
fields.desc: Player entity ID (for horse actions, the horse ID)

fields.name: action
fields.desc: START_SNEAKING, STOP_SNEAKING, STOP_SLEEPING, START_SPRINTING, STOP_SPRINTING, RIDING_JUMP, OPEN_INVENTORY

implementation.overview: C0BPacketEntityAction controls player actions: START/STOP_SNEAKING, START/STOP_SPRINTING, STOP_SLEEPING, RIDING_JUMP, OPEN_INVENTORY. Essential for keeping sprint, scaffold sneaking, WTap knockback, and disabler modes.

modules.name: KeepSprint / AutoSprint
modules.purpose: Block incoming STOP_SPRINTING to maintain sprint indefinitely.
modules.how_it_works: Cancel C0B with STOP_SPRINTING action in EventReceivePacket.

modules.name: WTap / SuperKnockback
modules.purpose: Rapid sprint toggle before attack for extra knockback.

implementation.general_hooks: EventSendPacket (outgoing) or EventReceivePacket (incoming for KeepSprint). Actions: 0=START_SNEAKING, 1=STOP_SNEAKING, 2=STOP_SLEEPING, 3=START_SPRINTING, 4=STOP_SPRINTING, 5=RIDING_JUMP, 6=OPEN_INVENTORY.
implementation.client_variations:
Tenacity 5.1: SuperKnockback spams sprint toggle. Disabler MMC intercepts START_SPRINTING.
Sigma 3.9: KeepSprint cancels incoming STOP_SPRINTING.
Monsoon 3.0-A6: Scaffold Watchdog blocks all sprint C0B.
Helium B41420: RinaOrc disabler cancels C0B+C0F together.
November 0.2: WTap extra knockback via sprint toggle.
